projects.title: Intuit
projects.description: Library for language and embeddings models for D with options, tooling, and much much more, supporting OpenAI-style endpoints natively.

projects.title: Akashi
projects.description: Corpus for PubChem, Wikipedia, Psychonaut Wiki, PubMed, and PMC.

projects.title: Chemica
projects.description: PubChem wiki app for compounds with integration for Wikipedia, Psychonaut Wiki, PubMed, and PMC.

projects.title: Multidasm
projects.description: Comptime dynamic assembler for cross-arch routine compilation built from the ground up for D comptime integration.

projects.title: Webull-SDK
projects.description: Webull SDK for D with native-feeling finance types.

projects.title: Turnt
projects.description: Music player using a vinyl record centric theme and minimal UI.

projects.title: Jitsort
projects.description: Just-In-Time sorting algorithm that dynamically generates code to sort data in O(1)!

projects.title: AutoHandshake!
projects.description: Comprehensive workflow automation suite for Handshake AI.

projects.title: LinkedIn
projects.description: LinkedIn Learning scraper using Selenium and Nokogiri for aggregating course and learning path data.

projects.title: Nimbus
projects.description: Linux for configuring external and integrated displays through DDC/CI and backlight, with powerful CLI queries.

projects.title: Mobster
projects.description: Implementation of the BitTorrent protocol in D as well as Python streaming support for torrent providers.

projects.title: Intel Intrinsics
projects.description: Fork of Intel Intrinsics for D (https://github.com/AuburnSounds/intel-intrinsics), implementing AVX512 and a dozen+ intrinsics. Merged into codebase.

projects.title: Cassowary
projects.description: CoreCLR manipulation library written entirely in managed code, providing significantly faster reflection and dynamic capabilities.
projects.note: Currently being developed privately using Microsoft's CLRMD library.

projects.title: Godwit
projects.description: Semi-completed rewrite of Cassowary in D, with all structures implemented but no logic. Useful as a reference implementation but not functional.

projects.title: Tern
projects.description: Extensive standard library expansion for D's Phobos focusing on performance and comptime features.
projects.note: The project is maintained, but current effort is focused on a rewrite tailored to newer needs.

projects.title: Pipit
projects.description: Blazingly fast terminal editor designed from the ground up for efficiency and throughput by extensively leveraging AVX2 and AVX512.

projects.title: Depcat
projects.description: TModLoader (Terraria) mod for dynamic dependency injection of unmanaged code.

projects.title: Swaypaper
projects.description: Minimal SWWW wrapper for slideshow wallpapers from multiple directories.

projects.title: Challenge02
projects.description: Challenge library for SIMD high entropy encryption algorithms, CAHS 2024.

projects.title: GarbageCorruptor
projects.description: Corrupts the GC heap as optimally as possible. Experiment on CoreCLR exposure.

projects.title: UndeadInterop
projects.description: Syscall library for C#, using shellcode and exports to resolve and execute syscalls as well as detect hooks on functions.

projects.title: Rio
projects.description: Assembly-like dynamic scripting language, with C# object wrappers, designed for code virtualization.

projects.title: MhyprotExp
projects.description: Process enumeration, module enumeration, AoB scanning, kernel R/W, and more by exploiting vulnerable IOCTL for the mhyprot2 driver.
